mapper.select:
SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName, S.QUANTITY AS quantity, S.SAFETY_STOCK AS safetyStock FROM STOCKS S JOIN ITEMS I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON S.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND I.ITEM_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCode}, '%')
AND I.ITEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
AND W.WAREHOUSE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{warehouseName}, '%')
AND S.QUANTITY = 0
AND S.QUANTITY > 0 AND S.QUANTITY <= S.SAFETY_STOCK
AND S.QUANTITY > S.SAFETY_STOCK
ORDER BY I.ITEM_CODE ASC, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME ASC

SELECT S.STOCK_ID AS stockId, S.ITEM_ID AS itemId, S.WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, S.QUANTITY AS quantity, S.SAFETY_STOCK AS safetyStock, I.ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, W.WAREHOUSE_NAME AS warehouseName FROM STOCKS S JOIN ITEMS I ON S.ITEM_ID = I.ITEM_ID JOIN WAREHOUSES W ON S.WAREHOUSE_ID = W.WAREHOUSE_ID WHERE S.STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCKS SET QUANTITY = IFNULL(#{quantity}, 0), SAFETY_STOCK = IFNULL(#{safetyStock}, 0) WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID AS stockId, ITEM_ID AS itemId, WAREHOUSE_ID AS warehouseId, QUANTITY AS quantity, SAFETY_STOCK AS safetyStock, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM STOCKS WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId} AND WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}
